title: Furniture with create and sable compat
description: This mod adds compatibility to Create and [Lets Do] Furniture, another furniture, quark and handcrafted and also works with Sable (physics engine for Create Aeronautics)
body:
# Mod needs create or sable to work and actually do something

You can now seat on contraptions and trains and physical entities from mod [sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable) and [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), works just like create seats but with [lets do furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-furniture), [another-furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture), [handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted), [quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark), [unusal furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/unusual-furniture)  you can seat mobs on it too, just like in create contraptions and trains
